name: Shoppers Stop HDFC Bank Credit Card
exclusions: grocery reward accrual capped at 1,000 points per month
milestoneBenefits: Reward Points worth Rs 500 per month for a purchase of Rs 15,000 or above on weekends at Shoppers Stop
additionalBenefits: Rs 500 Shoppers Stop voucher as welcome benefit, redeemable on any transaction at Shoppers Stop store
3% Reward Points on every Shoppers Stop purchase
1% Reward Points on non-Shoppers Stop spends
Complimentary Shoppers Stop Silver Edge membership worth Rs 350
Link RuPay Credit Card to UPI for scan-and-pay transactions
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period
Simple card management via HDFC Bank MyCards
Protection against fraudulent transactions when reported immediately

selfEmployed: Annual ITR greater than Rs 6 lakh
